story.text: **The Prover.** The zero-knowledge posture. Odd symmetry with Blade 42, The Answer.

## On the lattice

- **Complement** (bnot = 63 − 21 = 42): [[Artefact 42 — The Answer]] — everything this blade is not.
- **Successor** (the dihedral walk `neg(bnot(x)) = succ(x)`): [[Artefact 22 — Unnamed]].
- Forged in [[The Workshops]] — each shop instances one or more of these six dimensions at its vertex.
